narrative: U.S. blockade on Iran and Hormuz shipping tolls drive a 9% crude surge, introducing a sharp geopolitical risk premium; USD/JPY firms to 162.46 as hawkish Fed commentary offsets the 275bp carry-unwind risk. Gold lower -2.60% near $4,007; equities -0.79%; DXY +0.36%; VIX 17.2. USD/CHF IV at 24.8% vs HV30 6.3% signals extreme hedging demand. Watch BoC Rate Decision 13:45 UTC Wednesday.
